positive: Minimalist vector art illustration of a sprawling celestial forest. The central element is a group of interconnected, glowing bioluminescent trees forming a stylized canopy, contrasting against a deep indigo and cosmic violet nebula background. Silhouettes of various stylized, gentle fauna (e.g., humming winged creatures, graceful deer-like spirits) are woven among the branches. The style should be high-contrast, geometric, and slightly psychedelic, reminiscent of Art Deco meets stained glass. Use complementary colors: neon teal, electric lavender, and warm gold for the glow, sharply outlined against the dark background. Perfect for a centered, repeat apparel print, emphasizing clear lines, clean separation, and strong visual impact. Conceptually represents 'Dreaming of the Cosmos'.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, signature, writing, cartoon, realistic photography, messy, cluttered, complex background, messy lines
